title: cleoserrata serrata
intro: Cleoserrata serrata, also known as Cleome serrulata, is a flowering plant species in the Cleomaceae family, native to North America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Cleoserrata serrata has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as acting as an antibacterial agent to combat infections. Cleoserrata serrata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
